name: Cervical Spine MRI
description: Cervical spine MRI for cord and soft tissue evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the cervical spine with sagittal T1, T2, and axial T2 sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Spinal Cord
sections.content: Spinal cord [has normal signal / no cord edema / no mass / no syrinx].

sections.name: Disc Levels
sections.content: C2-C3: [normal / no herniation]. C3-C4: [normal / no herniation]. C4-C5: [normal / no herniation]. C5-C6: [normal / no herniation]. C6-C7: [normal / no herniation]. C7-T1: [normal / no herniation].

sections.name: Foramina
sections.content: Neural foramina are [patent / no stenosis] bilaterally.

sections.name: Vertebral Bodies
sections.content: Vertebral bodies [have normal marrow signal / no lesion / no compression].

impression:
1. No cord abnormality.
2. No significant disc herniation.
3. Normal cervical spine MRI.
